# Journal of Higher Education Studies — Author Guidelines (Synthetic Fixture)

**Journal:** Journal of Higher Education Studies
**Publisher:** Example Academic Press
**URL:** https://www.example-jhes.com

## Aims and Scope

An interdisciplinary journal publishing research on higher education policy,
pedagogy, institutional analysis, and the philosophy of education.

## Article Types

- **Research Article**: original empirical or theoretical research
- **Review Article**: systematic literature review
- **Commentary**: short response to published work

## Submission Requirements

- **Language:** English
- **Abstract:** 200-250 words
- **Word count:** 6,000-12,000 words (excluding references and appendices)
- **Keywords:** 5-8
- **Citation style:** APA 7th edition

## Language Policy

English only.
